CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Continued To Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion To Seal The Parties Confidential Settlement Agreement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan McCormick, Esq. 415-296-8420 of McCormick & Erlich for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL AN, JOSHUA KIM, SEUNG-JAE YIM's Joint Motion To Seal The Parties Confidential Settlement Agreement.

Plaintiffs and defendants' joint motion to seal the parties' confidential settlement agreement is denied. Absent unusual circumstances and here there are none provided, any settlement of a case where there is a PAGA claim should be open to the public.

Order is signed in Open court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Joint Motion To Approve Settlement Pursuant To The Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan McCormick, Esq. 415-296-8420 of McCormick & Erlich for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL AN, JOSHUA KIM, SEUNG-JAE YIM's Joint Motion To Approve Settlement Pursuant To The Labor Code Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004.

The Court grants the Joint motion and thereby approves the settlement of the Plaintiff's PAGA cause of action.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
